name: Drunk Alien
short_description: Help this drunk alien find his way back to his spaceship in this challenging adventure!
detailed_description:
After a sad night of drinking, our alien hero finds himself tumbling off his spaceship. Now, it’s up to you to guide him back to safety!

Simplicity Meets Challenge

You can only use "W" and "Spacebar". With no side-to-side or backwards movement, every leap is a test of precision and patience. Expect to fall—often!

Two Unique Levels to Conquer: Earth and Space

Rage-Inducing Gameplay

Prepare for a hilariously frustrating experience! With funny sound effects accompanying every jump and an annoyingly catchy background tune that quickly turns repetitive, you’ll find yourself both laughing and raging as you climb up.

Mental Challenge Awaits

Drunk Alien isn’t just about climbing up; it’s about mastering your frustration and honing your skills. It is designed to push your limits, making victory all the more satisfying.

Can you help him return? Join Drunk Alien on this unpredictable journey where every leap counts, and every fall is just part of the fun. Will you help him reclaim his place in the stars? Get ready for a challenge that will have you shouting in triumph—or despair!
